external_resources.name: NCBI Datasets API v2 — genome dataset_report
external_resources.use: Resolve assembly_name, GC%, genome length, contig count, protein-coding gene count for each assembly accession.

external_resources.name: NCBI genome FTP (assembly proteomes / genomes)
external_resources.use: Download <acc>_<asm>_protein.faa.gz (RefSeq annotated proteomes); fallback <acc>_<asm>_genomic.fna.gz + pyrodigal gene calling for unannotated assemblies.

external_resources.name: EBI InterPro — Pfam HMM profiles
external_resources.use: Fetch 20 marker HMMs (LPS/outer-membrane vs cell-wall/anchor) for hmmsearch.

external_resources.name: NCBI Entrez efetch (taxonomy)
external_resources.use: Retrieve family rank per tax_id — used ONLY for family-grouped cross-validation, NOT as a model feature.

notes: Model features are strictly genome-sequence-derived (marker-gene HMM hits, GC/size/coding-density, amino-acid composition) plus the provided phylum. Organism names / species / genus / family were never used as predictive features.
